hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.kt|*.kts) jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"Kubriko code-style skill applies to this Kotlin file (.claude/skills/code-style/SKILL.md): comment with restraint (do not narrate routine code); use KDoc (/** */), never //, for any declaration-level doc; document 100% of public API in published modules; never explain already-fixed bugs; prefer clear names over comments; match the surrounding file style."}}' ;; esac
